Class Game

java.lang.Object
Game.Game
public class Game extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Game(AbstractPlayer player1, AbstractPlayer player2)
    Creates an instance of Quarto game with 2 players.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    doMove(Move move)
    Does the move on the board if the move is valid.
    List<Piece>
    getAvailablePieces()
    Gets the list of pieces still available to be picked.
    Board
    getBoard()
     
    Piece
    getCurrentPiece()
    Gets the current piece that must be placed.
    String
    getCurrentPlayerName()
    Gets the name of the current player (who is taking their turn).
    String
    getEndReason()
     
    String
    getOpponentName()
    Gets the name of the opponent (the player who is NOT currently taking their turn).
    Piece
    getPieceById(int pieceId)
    Gets a piece by its ID from the available pieces.
    List<Move>
    getValidMoves()
    Gives all valid moves that can be played in the current state of the game.
    String
    getWinnerName()
     
    boolean
    isGameOver()
    Checks if the game is over (win or draw).
    boolean
    isValidMove(Move move)
    Checks if a specific move is valid.
    void
    pickCurrentPiece(Piece piece)
    Before ending a turn, player has to pick the piece for the opponent to play.
    void
    setResult(String reason, String winner)
     
    void
    start()
    Main function to be called when starting a particular game.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(AbstractPlayer player1, AbstractPlayer player2)
      Creates an instance of Quarto game with 2 players.

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Main function to be called when starting a particular game.

    • doMove

      public boolean doMove(Move move)
      Does the move on the board if the move is valid.
      Parameters:
      move - The move to be played
      Returns:
      true if move was valid and applied, false otherwise

    • pickCurrentPiece

      public void pickCurrentPiece(Piece piece)
      Before ending a turn, player has to pick the piece for the opponent to play.
      Parameters:
      piece - the piece that is intended to be played next.

    • getValidMoves

      public List<Move> getValidMoves()
      Gives all valid moves that can be played in the current state of the game.
      Returns:
      List of all moves that can be played

    • isValidMove

      public boolean isValidMove(Move move)
      Checks if a specific move is valid.
      Parameters:
      move - the move to check
      Returns:
      true if the move is allowed

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Checks if the game is over (win or draw).
      Returns:
      true if game is over

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()

    • getCurrentPiece

      public Piece getCurrentPiece()
      Gets the current piece that must be placed.
      Returns:
      the piece to be placed, or null if no piece is set

    • getPieceById

      public Piece getPieceById(int pieceId)
      Gets a piece by its ID from the available pieces.
      Parameters:
      pieceId - the ID of the piece to find
      Returns:
      the Piece, or null if not found/already used

    • getOpponentName

      public String getOpponentName()
      Gets the name of the opponent (the player who is NOT currently taking their turn).
      Returns:
      the opponent's name

    • getCurrentPlayerName

      public String getCurrentPlayerName()
      Gets the name of the current player (who is taking their turn).
      Returns:
      the current player's name

    • getAvailablePieces

      public List<Piece> getAvailablePieces()
      Gets the list of pieces still available to be picked.
      Returns:
      list of available pieces

    • setResult

      public void setResult(String reason, String winner)

    • getEndReason

      public String getEndReason()

    • getWinnerName

      public String getWinnerName()
